character.description: frail ash-green fire-and-curse shaman with rust-and-ochre robes and crooked staff with attached ember brazier, facing left

chroma_key.name: cyan
chroma_key.selection_reason: highest 1st-percentile subject distance among the 4 candidate(s) clearing the 96 erase radius

idle.action: precise four-frame idle loop: base stance, tiny lowered breath with one blink, gentle raised breath, then a final pose nearly identical to the base; keep staff height, feet, torso lean, cloak contour, and attached brazier alignment stable across the seam

attack.action: decisive four-stage staff curse cast: compact draw-back, strong forward staff thrust with the hanging brazier clearly separated from the torso and bright orange-yellow flame, extended follow-through, full recovery toward combat idle; all effects stay physically attached

hurt.action: clear four-stage hurt sequence while consistently facing left: upright impact recoil, deepest backward bend and stagger while gripping the staff, visibly higher partial recovery, settled combat idle; no counterattack and no detached effects

style: match the accepted idle anchor exactly: bright crisp 16-bit-inspired pixel art, 32px-grid aesthetic, chunky SD proportions, identical outline weight, strong olive-green highlights on face, long ear, hands and feet, cream bone ornaments, rust-orange cloak, dark brown crooked staff, and attached bright orange-yellow ember brazier; preserve high value separation at small size
